message:
fix(store): allow INCRBYFLOAT/HINCRBYFLOAT with infinity, reject only NaN

Redis accepts "inf" and "-inf" as increments for INCRBYFLOAT and
HINCRBYFLOAT, returning "inf"/"-inf" as the result. Only NaN results
(e.g. inf + (-inf)) are rejected. Added IncrFloatNaN error variant
with Redis-accurate message "ERR increment would produce NaN or
Infinity". Added 15 conformance tests for infinity edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
